_README: Zoho CRM Workflow Automation Specifications - Automates data maintenance and alerts
_INSTRUCTIONS: Implement these workflows in Zoho CRM: Setup > Automation > Workflow Rules
_PRIORITY: HIGH - Reduces manual work and catches data issues automatically

workflows.name: Auto-Assign Weight Category on Audit
workflows.description: Automatically updates weight category when product is audited with new weight

trigger.condition: Last_Audited_Total_Weight_kg is not null AND Last_Audited_Total_Weight_kg > 0

actions.description: Calculate and set Weight_Category_Audited based on actual weight
Flag mismatch if audited category differs from billed category

task.subject: Review weight category mismatch for ${Product_Name}
task.description: Audited weight (${Last_Audited_Total_Weight_kg} kg) falls into category '${Weight_Category_Audited}', but product is billed under '${Weight_Category_Billed}'. Please verify and update billing category if needed.

email.subject: Weight Category Mismatch Alert: ${Product_Name}

workflows.implementation_notes: Create custom field 'Weight_Category_Audited' and 'Category_Mismatch' (checkbox) before implementing

workflows.name: Sync Parent Data to Child Products
workflows.description: When parent SKU data is updated, propagate changes to all child products

trigger.condition: Any of the tracked fields is updated

actions.description: Update all child products with parent's category

workflows.implementation_notes: Ensure child products don't override parent data unless explicitly needed. Consider adding 'Override_Parent' flag for exceptions.

workflows.name: Alert on Empty Critical Fields
workflows.description: Daily scheduled workflow to identify records with missing critical data

trigger.condition: Product_Category == null OR Weight_Category_Billed == null OR Live_Status == null

email.subject: Daily Data Quality Report - Missing Critical Fields

task.subject: Urgent: ${Incomplete_Count} products missing critical data
task.description: Multiple products are missing required fields. Review the daily data quality report and complete the missing information.

workflows.implementation_notes: Create custom function to calculate Data_Quality_Score based on completeness percentage

workflows.name: Auto-Create Audit History Record
workflows.description: Creates audit history record when product weight is updated

record_data.Notes: Weight updated from ${Old_Value.Last_Audited_Total_Weight_kg} kg to ${Last_Audited_Total_Weight_kg} kg

workflows.implementation_notes: Requires Audit_History module to be created first (see Phase 3 Task 3.3 in execution plan)

workflows.name: Prevent Category Field Swap
workflows.description: Prevents users from accidentally entering weight values (e.g., '25kg') into Product_Category field

actions.description: Check if Product_Category contains weight pattern

logic.then: Block save with error: 'Product Category cannot be a weight value. Did you mean to enter this in Weight Category Billed?'

logic.if: Product_Category matches regex '^\d+\s*kg$' AND Weight_Category_Billed is empty
then: Show_Warning = 'Auto-corrected: Moved weight value from Category to Weight Category field'

workflows.implementation_notes: This addresses the root cause discovered in Phase 1 audit. Prevents the swap issue from happening again.

implementation_guide.step_1: Review all workflows and ensure dependent custom fields exist
implementation_guide.step_2: Create custom fields if needed: Weight_Category_Audited, Category_Mismatch, Data_Quality_Score
implementation_guide.step_3: Go to Zoho CRM Setup > Automation > Workflow Rules
implementation_guide.step_5: Configure trigger conditions and actions as specified
implementation_guide.step_6: Test with sample records in sandbox/development org first
implementation_guide.step_7: Deploy to production one workflow at a time
implementation_guide.step_9: Adjust timing/conditions based on actual usage patterns

custom_fields_required.description: Auto-calculated category based on audited weight
Flag indicating audited category differs from billed category

testing_checklist: ✅ Update product weight - verify category auto-assigns
✅ Create mismatch - verify task and email sent
✅ Update parent category - verify children update
✅ Check scheduled workflow runs at 9 AM
✅ Try entering '25kg' in Product_Category - verify blocked
✅ Verify audit history record created on weight update
